# DECLuTTER AI

> ADHD-friendly AI decluttering assistant for neurodivergent users.

DECLuTTER AI turns a photo of a cluttered area into grouped items, simple keep/donate/trash/relocate/maybe decisions, resale estimates, and local trade workflows.

## Use cases
- ADHD-friendly decluttering sprints
- On-device object detection for organization
- Resale valuation and listing preparation
- Local barter/trade marketplace experiments
- Flutter + FastAPI reference app

## Key paths
- `README.md`: public overview and quick start
- `app/`: Flutter mobile app
- `server/`: FastAPI backend
- `docs/`: product and integration documentation

## Keywords
ADHD decluttering, neurodivergent productivity, AI decluttering assistant, Flutter object detection, FastAPI marketplace, resale valuation, local barter, privacy-first organization.
